questions.question: Describe the primary difference between inter-process communication (IPC) and inter-thread communication (ITC).
questions.hint: Explain the difference in context of process and thread.

questions.question: What is the advantage of using Semicolonated Synchronisation (semaphore) in a multi-threaded program?
questions.hint: Explain the benefits of semaphore in multi-threaded programming.

questions.question: State the purpose of the 'fork' system call in Unix-based operating systems.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of forking in operating systems.
